name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 熊熊烈焰
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 熊熊烈焰
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. It has been painted using a rust-tinted hydrographic of a gel pen doodle. Honor your dead
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 枪身用中性笔绘制了铁锈色的花纹。 死者为大
